name: Average-Power-Budgeted Underwater Vehicle Control via Constrained Reinforcement Learning

description: arXiv:2606.25680v2 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: Underwater vehicles operate from a fixed onboard energy budget that propulsion rapidly depletes, so a controller that completes its task while drawing less thruster power directly extends mission range and endurance. Reinforcement learning yields capable model-free controllers for station-keeping and trajectory tracking, but optimizing t...
author: Yinuo Wang, Gavin Tao, Yuze Liu, John V. Ringwood
